ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the team is participating in */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the team plays */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the team was established */,
  "home_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home venue for the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL for the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standings record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the standings are for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "win_percentage" TEXT /* Win percentage */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Home record in the format of W-L-T */,
  "road_record" TEXT /* Road record in the format of W-L-T */,
  "conference_record" TEXT /* Conference record in the format of W-L-T */,
  "division_record" TEXT /* Division record in the format of W-L-T */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current win/loss streak */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the standings were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  "broadcast_channel" TEXT /* Channel that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with, if applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the statistics are for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: Season the team is participating in
ID of the sport the team plays
ID of the home venue for the team
